opportunities.title: [Hiring] Bitrix24 CRM Developer (Remote / Freelance / Gurgaon) – Ongoing Role
opportunities.description:
[Hiring] Bitrix24 CRM Developer (Remote / Freelance / Gurgaon) – Ongoing Role

What we need We're a multi-location healthcare group in India that runs its entire patient operation on Bitrix24, from the first enquiry all the way through to long-term post-treatment care, across four locations and a contact centre team of around 70 users. The system is already heavily configured and connected to several other tools. What we do not have is a dedicated Bitrix developer.
